title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. Layers: (1) prevFgHint early capture before EnsureCdpConnection, (2) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) not SW_MINIMIZE(6), (3) ForceForegroundWindow(AttachThreadInput) replacing silent-fail SetForegroundWindowRaw, (4) StartFocusWatchdog 200ms monitor-only during entire ask op, (5) RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync at each action boundary, (6) FocuslessWarningOverlay + ActionApi.OnFocusStealer prop stamp. MANDATORY: focus restoration MUST integrate with InputReadiness (입력위치확보기) -- do NOT implement standalone restore without going through InputReadiness pipeline. InputReadiness owns the user-yield decision; bypass is FORBIDDEN. RESTORE TRIGGER: end of each ask/CDP action boundary only. CRITICAL GAP: after 5s restore timeout, system gives up silently.
steps: 0. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths MUST go through InputReadiness pipeline: (a) call InputReadiness.Probe() before restore attempt, (b) respect AutoApproveYield decision, (c) fire OnProbeSuccess so auto-hack and zoom activate on target window. Standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness is FORBIDDEN except inside RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync inner loop.

1. [MANDATORY] EnsureCdpReadyAsync must call InputReadiness.Probe() -- current manual substitute (KeyboardInput.IsInputLockedByOther + FocusStealer prop check) does NOT fire OnProbeSuccess. Fix: CreateInputReadiness() + Probe(AutoApproveYield:true) before zoom and restore.
2. prevFgGemini = GetForegroundWindow() BEFORE EnsureCdpConnection (not after tab switch)
3. EnsureCdpReadyAsync(prevFgHint) -- passes hint so EnsureCdp uses correct pre-switch prevFg
4. StartFocusWatchdog(prevFg, cdp) -- 200ms MONITOR ONLY: detect + notify via FocuslessWarningOverlay, do NOT restore (restore is action-boundary responsibility)
5. After insert-text ends: GuardCdpFocusTheft -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
6. After file-attach ends: LogRestoreFocus -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
7. After send ends: LogRestoreFocus -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
8. After wait-response ends: LogRestoreFocus -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
9. RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: snapshot IME+cursor -> ForceForegroundWindow loop -> OnFocusStealer(AutoBugReport+overlay) -> restore IME+cursor on success
10. [TODO-P2] FireAutoHeal on restore timeout: 5s exhausted -> AutoBugReport(unrecoverable) + FireAutoHeal(focus-theft, chromeHwnd)
11. [TODO-P3] prevFg re-capture between phases (persona inject / file attach / question send)
author: claude
